CustomField.description: This field stores the name of the payer
CustomField.formula: IF( TEXT(Program_Type__c) = "Coordinating Program", IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Coordinating_Program__c)), Coordinating_Program__r.Name, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Parent_Account__c)), Parent_Account__r.Name, NULL ) ), NULL )
CustomField.label: Payer
